response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (10+ years) but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this C++ Capital Markets role. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience is shown. SQL Server/Oracle experience is not demonstrated (MongoDB and generic SQL only). Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and product development, which does not align with this role.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development with strong engineering fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Strong communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience vs. the required 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is primarily MongoDB

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
